market_pulse: Memorial Day weekend peak activation across Strip: LIV leads with Metro Boomin tonight (FRI), OMNIA/Encore/Zouk coordinating major talent, all venues at weekend capacity readiness.

weekend_readiness.label: PEAK
weekend_readiness.liv_recommendation: CAPITALIZE: Metro Boomin draw is historic. Push user-generated content, story countdowns, and exclusive access angles. Maximize LIV Beach with complement entertainment for Saturday/Sunday overflow.

content_gaps.description: Competitors posting BTS prep content, talent arrivals, sound check moments. LIV minimal BTS coverage vs Encore/OMNIA.
content_gaps.suggested_action: Deploy Stories today with backstage setup, talent arrivals, sound check footage. Humanize the Metro Boomin production.

content_gaps.description: Competitors reposting/tagging attendee content heavily. LIV feed shows event-centric but fewer UGC reblogs.
content_gaps.suggested_action: Create Stories highlight 'LIV Tonight' — tag/repost attendee posts, create branded hashtag campaign #LIVMetroBootmin or similar.

content_gaps.description: OMNIA, Zouk, Encore all running active countdown content to events. LIV posts lineups but lighter countdown narrative.
content_gaps.suggested_action: Story stickers: 'X hours to Metro Boomin,' polls ('What song first?'), swipe-up urgency tactics this evening.

influencer_activity.mention: Metro Boomin headlining LIV tonight (FRI 5/29). Major hip-hop draw with high cross-promotion potential.
Performing at OMNIA tonight (FRI 5/29). Competes directly with LIV for high-ticket attendee crossover.
OMNIA SAT 5/30. Major draw for Saturday pool-to-nightlife transition attendees.
Encore Beach Club, multiple dates. High engagement on pool/daytime content.
Zouk SAT 5/30. Electronic/house crossover audience, lower overlap with LIV hip-hop positioning but worth monitoring.
